description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build job that runs in the default stage using the runner's default image and no services. In the global before_script install system packages with apt-get update -yq, apt-get install -y npm, apt-get install nodejs-legacy, apt-get install git, then globally install bower and grunt-cli via npm, run npm install, and run bower install --allow-root. The build job executes the command grunt. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
